headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma faces class action over supply chain optimization service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs in precision manufacturing directly threaten Krevum Pharmaceuticals' profitability and margin stability.

sentiment.reasoning: A new head of process automation at Krevum Pharmaceuticals introduces potential for strategic shifts.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
